top_visible_issues: Mobile page speed of 65 suggests room for optimisation, particularly relevant for visitors browsing on the go in a busy hospitality location.
No blog or updates section is present, limiting opportunities for fresh content that could support local search visibility.
Testimonials appear to be manually displayed with no dynamic content section, meaning the strong 4.9-star Google rating is not being surfaced automatically on the site.
outreach_hook: Arnos Bistrot has built an impressive online reputation with a 4.9-star rating across nearly 300 reviews, and your website reflects a well-established presence. We would welcome the chance to share some specific observations if it would be useful.
